{{Quote|We can't risk damaging the environment or the Kolto.|Sami to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Sami''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who was living on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Sami was stationed on [[Hrakert Station]] in [[3956 BBY]]. Sami was working on manufacuting synthetic kolto when Hrakert Station was overrun by [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] driven insane by the [[Progenitor]]. Along with [[Kono Nolan]], she was one of the few survivors found by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].

As Nolan's moral counterpart, she advocated destroying the [[Kolto/Legends|kolto]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] machinery to tame the [[Progenitor]], which Revan decided to follow, to the great dismay of the amoral Nolan who advocated using an experimental poison to kill the great [[Firaxan shark/Legends|firaxa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
